transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bridgeview Care Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medicine. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Mark Delaney, born March 4th, 1968.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Mark. I see your lisinopril prescription from Dr. Whitfield, last filled about three weeks ago. Which pharmacy would you like it sent to?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Same one as always, the Riverside Pharmacy on Elm Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. I'm sending the refill request to Riverside Pharmacy now for thirty tablets, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, how long till it's ready?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Usually within a couple hours, but I'd suggest calling ahead before you drive over.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Will do. Thanks so much for the help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Mark. Anything else I can do for you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Have a good day.
